name: Necromancer
description: A dark caster who drains life and commands minions. Necromancers wither foes with death coil, summon servants and mend with cure; where a mage is a fragile nuker, the necromancer trades raw spell mana for sturdier health, standing behind its pets and sustaining on stolen life. At level 15 they learn soul rot, a heavy curse that rots a foe's flesh and defences.
